[Service Details](?1dmy&urile=wcm%3apath%3a%2Fte%2Fbusiness%2Fbusiness-revamp%2Fbusiness-home%2Fmobile-services%2Fwe-business%2Fwe-business)

#### Voice Services

Fixed line enables customers to make calls and get online from anywhere. Customers need to visit the nearest exchange to subscribe to this service.

[Service Details](?1dmy&urile=wcm%3apath%3a%2Fte%2Fbusiness%2Fbusiness-revamp%2Fbusiness-home%2Fvoice-services%2Flandline%2Fbusiness-landline)

#### Data & Connectivity Services

WE ADSL provides a high speed fixed Internet connectivity.

[Service Details](?1dmy&urile=wcm%3apath%3a%2Fte%2Fbusiness%2Fbusiness-revamp%2Fbusiness-home%2Fdata-connectivity-services%2Fadsl%2Fbusiness_adsl)

#### Data Center & Cloud Services

Co-location hosting offers the best hosting facilities and remote management tools for the customers owned hardware to ensure professional service operation

[Service Details](?1dmy&urile=wcm%3apath%3a%2Fte%2Fbusiness%2Fbusiness-revamp%2Fbusiness-home%2Fdata-center-services%2Fcolocation-hosting%2Fco-location_hosting)

#### Managed ICT Services

Access and Control your business quick and easy everywhere all the time

[Service Details](/wps/portal/te/Business/ICT/We-Access)

# Quarterly Results

## FY 2025

Q4 2025 results released, earnings call on 26 February 2026, contact IR to dial-in. 

[Financial Statements](/en/FinancialInformation/FinancialStatements)

 

[Earnings Releases](/en/FinancialInformation/QuarterlyResults)

## FY 2025 Results: Telecom Egypt Delivers Growth Ahead of Expectations

26 February 2026

Telecom Egypt (Ticker: ETEL.CA; TEEG.LN) today announced its audited financial results, according to the Egyptian Accounting Standards (EAS), for the full year 31 December 2025. 

[Read More](/en/CorporateNews/PressRelease/235/FY-2025-Results-Telecom-Egypt-Delivers-Growth-Ahead-of-Expectations)

## Telecom Egypt Announces Organizational Transformation and Key Leadership Appointments 

31 December 2025

Telecom Egypt today announced an organizational transformation initiative approved by its Board of Directors. The transformation is designed to enhance the Company’s strategic focus and operational agility while reinforcing its customer-centric approach. 

[Read More](/en/CorporateNews/PressRelease/234/Telecom-Egypt-Announces-Organizational-Transformation-and-Key-Leadership-Appointments)

# About Us

Telecom Egypt is the first total telecom operator in Egypt providing all telecom services to its customers including fixed and mobile voice and data services. Telecom Egypt has a long history serving Egyptian customers for over 170 years maintaining a leadership position in the Egyptian telecom market by offering the most advanced technology, reliable infrastructure solutions and the widest network of submarine cables. The company also owns a 45% stake in Vodafone Egypt. 

[Board of Directors](https://te.eg/wps/portal/te/About/About%20Us/!ut/p/z1/pZHLTsMwEEV_pSyytGacpLG9jBQJSkUfVKWNN8ip3WJInLS1EPw9DiBUhAAhZjevo3tnQMIapFOPdqe8bZ2qQ17K7HY8L2I6PccxzgTD_CpLl_OCU5xRuAEJcuN85--g9CbCgzlabZy3qo6wO7RN26OOETZtZWtzWhu8lQa1ctq6XU_qNlZDmfBKJEwnRPNYk5QqThRPGcmGFTImON0aDavfpMnQxm8ix7AvX0c-CFORiUAYFSiuWYw8fh_4gVEGDexEA8eeQJPRcHlBcUFh8UdTl58lfTUVHmLv93uZh6u3zpsnD-t_nr1rGp48k4ftZEJkmZ-9AOaeSzQ!/dz/d5/L2dJQSEvUUt3QS80TmxFL1o2X0tRRDIxT0cwS085NjkwQU1JRDA5UjcyRzYx/?1dmy&urile=wcm%3apath%3a/te/AboutTE/AboutUs/Board+of+Directors) [Executive Management](https://te.eg/wps/portal/te/About/About%20Us/!ut/p/z1/pZHLTsMwEEV_pSyytGacpLG9jBQJSkUfVKWNN8ip3WJInLS1EPw9DiBUhAAhZjevo3tnQMIapFOPdqe8bZ2qQ17K7HY8L2I6PccxzgTD_CpLl_OCU5xRuAEJcuN85--g9CbCgzlabZy3qo6wO7RN26OOETZtZWtzWhu8lQa1ctq6XU_qNlZDmfBKJEwnRPNYk5QqThRPGcmGFTImON0aDavfpMnQxm8ix7AvX0c-CFORiUAYFSiuWYw8fh_4gVEGDexEA8eeQJPRcHlBcUFh8UdTl58lfTUVHmLv93uZh6u3zpsnD-t_nr1rGp48k4ftZEJkmZ-9AOaeSzQ!/dz/d5/L2dJQSEvUUt3QS80TmxFL1o2X0tRRDIxT0cwS085NjkwQU1JRDA5UjcyRzYx/?1dmy&urile=wcm%3apath%3a%2FTE%2FAboutTE%2FAboutUs%2FManagement%2BTeam%2F) [Our History](https://te.eg/wps/portal/te/About/About%20Us/!ut/p/z1/pZHLTsMwEEV_pSyytGacpLG9jBQJSkUfVKWNN8ip3WJInLS1EPw9DiBUhAAhZjevo3tnQMIapFOPdqe8bZ2qQ17K7HY8L2I6PccxzgTD_CpLl_OCU5xRuAEJcuN85--g9CbCgzlabZy3qo6wO7RN26OOETZtZWtzWhu8lQa1ctq6XU_qNlZDmfBKJEwnRPNYk5QqThRPGcmGFTImON0aDavfpMnQxm8ix7AvX0c-CFORiUAYFSiuWYw8fh_4gVEGDexEA8eeQJPRcHlBcUFh8UdTl58lfTUVHmLv93uZh6u3zpsnD-t_nr1rGp48k4ftZEJkmZ-9AOaeSzQ!/dz/d5/L2dJQSEvUUt3QS80TmxFL1o2X0tRRDIxT0cwS085NjkwQU1JRDA5UjcyRzYx/?1dmy&urile=wcm%3apath%3a%2FTE%2FAboutTE%2FAboutUs%2FHistory%2F)

## Stay ahead of everyone with 5G technology from WE

Be the First to Experience the Future with WE 5G Now for the first time 

### Ultra-fast Internet Speeds

Know More

### Top-notch Performance

Know More

### Flawless Connectivity

Know More

### Highest response and interaction

Know More

4G 5G

### 5G is now in Egypt

5G has arrived in Egypt with WE! Faster speeds, better performance, and a whole new experience with your bundles to enjoy your Internet without limits.

[ Mobile ](https://te.eg/wps/portal/te/Personal/5G/Mobile-Postpaid) [ ](https://te.eg/wps/portal/te/Personal/5G/Mobile-Postpaid) [ Home ](https://te.eg/wps/portal/te/Personal/5G)

Discover WE-Air Postpaid Plans

[Know More](https://te.eg/wps/portal/te/Personal/WE-Air-Postpaid)

Discover WE-Air Prepaid Plans

[Know More](https://te.eg/wps/portal/te/Personal/WE-Air-Prepaid)

## Devices & Promotion

[More Devices](https://te.eg/wps/portal/te/Personal/Devices/5G-Devices-Mobile/)

[More Promotions](https://te.eg/wps/portal/te/Personal/5G/5G-Promotions)

FAQ

 * What is the new 5G Technology?

 * 5G is the fifth generation of cellular technology, representing a significant advancement over previous generations. It's designed to enhance speed, lower latency (delay), and provide greater flexibility for wireless services, enabling the transmission of larger volumes of data compared to older networks.

 * Do I need to be in a 5G coverage area to use it?

 * Yes, to experience 5G speeds, you need to be in a location with WE’s 5G coverage. The 5G network is expanding across Egypt to reach more areas.

 * What do I need to use 5G Technology?

 * You will need to be in an area covered by 5G network (as coverage will be available gradually) and you should also have 5G enabled mobile handset.

 * Should I change my tariff or pay extra fees to use 5G services?

 * No need as WE is providing the 5G benefits with no extra fees or subscription. All what you will need is to enable 5G service on you device and to be in an area covered by 5G. All existing tariffs will enjoy 5G service for free. But we recommend upgrading your mobile internet bundle as using 5G high quality internet services takes higher mobile data consumption rates.

 * What happens if I leave a 5G coverage area?

 * Your device will automatically switch to the best available network, such as 4G or 3G, to keep you connected without interruption.

 * How can I check if my device supports 5G?

 * You can check your device’s specifications or call the customer care or visit the nearest WE store for assistance. Our team will help you confirm whether your router or MiFi device supports 5G.

 * Do I need to activate 5G on my device?

 * Majority of 5G Devices supports the service automatically, However, some devices needs manual setup as follows: 

**Device** | **Setting Steps** 
---|--- 
**Apple** | Settings:
 * Cellular
 * Choose “WE”
 * Voice & Data
 * Select “5G On” or “5G Auto” 
**Samsung** | Settings:
 * Connections
 * Mobile networks
 * Choose “WE”
 * Network mode
 * Select 5G 
**OPPO 
Realme 
Redmi 
Infinix 
Xiaomi** | Settings:
 * Mobile network
 * Choose “WE”
 * Preferred Network Type
 * Select 5G 
**HONOR 
HUAWEI ** | Settings:
 * Mobile network
 * Choose “WE”
 * Mobile Data
 * enable 5G for the default mobile data SIM
 * You have to choose “WE” as default mobile data SIM

### 

Quota & Flexibility

## Flexible Minutes & Mobile Internet Usage

With WE Gold, use your minutes and mobile internet allowance with more flexibility

 * Local minutes to WE or other networks will be charged 1:1
 * Mobile internet will be charged 1:1
 * If you run out of mobile internet, you can get mobile gigabytes using your minutes bundle with a rate (1 mobile megabyte = 1 minute)
 * If you run out of mobile internet and minutes, you can get mobile gigabytes using your fixed internet bundle with a rate (1 mobile megabyte = 20 fixed internet megabytes)
 * No separate allowance for SMS, it will be deducted from local minutes allowance (1 SMS = 1 minute)
 * Unused mobile internet gigabytes will be carried over to the following month
 * If you consume all the minutes and mobile internet, you can follow any of the below options: 
 * You will be charged for the mobile internet by any of the below options: 
 * Subscribe in any of [Nitro add-ons](https://te.eg/wps/portal/te/Personal/Mobile/Nitro-mobile-internet)
 * Or paying 5 EGP for every 200 MBs
 * You will be charged 14 Pts to 1 minute or 1 SMS.

ADSL Flexibility

### Fixed Internet Calculator

Upgrade Your Fixed Internet And Calculate The Extra Fees.

Calculate Fixed Internet

## Fixed Internet & WE Air Bundles

With WE Gold, you can upgrade your fixed internet bundle to better suit your needs

 * Each price point has its own fixed internet inclusive bundle
 * You can choose a higher fixed internet bundle and pay the difference with your monthly bill - Check “Fixed Internet Calculator” or the below table;

Fixed Internet Bundle | WE Gold & Fixed Internet Upgrade Fees (in EGP) 
---|--- 
260 | 525 | 775 | 1050 | 1300 | 2000 
Super 140GB | Free | Free | - 
Super 200GB | 65 | 65 | - 
Super 250GB | 135 | 135 | Free | Free | - 
Super 400GB | 317 | 317 | 182 | 182 | Free | - 
Super 600GB | 494 | 494 | 359 | 359 | 177 | Free 
Super 1TB | - | 790 | 613 
 
Also with WE Gold, you can enjoy WE Air subscription

 * You can enjoy only one of the two services, either fixed internet or WE Air, not both.
 * Current fees for WE Air routers will apply
 * To change from fixed internet to WE Air or vice versa, you need to visit WE store in condition there are no due amounts or router instalment fees.
 * To subscribe in WE Air, you will pay additional fees for the SIM card
 * After consuming the main bundle, you can add extra add-ons with additional fees.
 * WE Air bundle can’t be shared with family members.
 * You can enjoy any payment offers on the router fees (discount/ instalment) if available

TOD 

## Enjoy a Gift Subscription, with WE Gold.

For All We Gold customers, enjoy a gift TOD Subscription

WE Gold is offering you a monthly gift TOD subscription, the best sports and entertainment platform in the Middles East.

Watch the biggest football matches from top European Leagues and major championships like the English Premier League and the UEFA Champions League. Also, enjoy live broadcast of major sports events directly on your mobile phone or smart TV or any connected device at home.

Your TOD gift subscription is included as part of your WE Gold monthly plan, with no additional fees.

**How to Activate Your Gift Subscription:**

 * Send an SMS to 111 with the number (5) in the message body.
 * You’ll receive an SMS with your subscription link.
 * Click the link to visit TOD’s website, register your account, and redeem your gifted subscription.
 * Make sure to register using your WE Gold mobile number to activate your gift.
 * Download the TOD App on your mobile or smart TV and sign in using the username and password you created during registration

**Terms and Conditions:**

 * WE Gold 260 customers are eligible for the TOD gift subscription up to three times only.

Enjoy Premium Sports and Entertainment Experiences with WE Gold and TOD!

WE Gold Shamel Service by Vezeeta

## All WE Gold customers, free Shamel subscription by Vezeeta

WE GOLD availing shamel service from Vezeeta with an annual gift subscription offering you up to 80% discounts on all healthcare services.

Shamel discounts cover in-clinic services, surgeries, labs & scans, pharmacy orders and doctor consultations, all through the Vezeeta app at the click of a button.

From the largest network of 8000 healthcare providers, Shamel gives you unlimited number of transactions throughout your entire annual subscription without any approvals or hidden fees to connect you to the best healthcare at the lowest cost.

Sponsored by WE Bonus

This service is available for all WE Gold customers as part of the tariff with no extra fees.

WE Gold Tariff | Entitled Shamel | Shamel Validity 
---|---|--- 
WE Gold 260 | Shamel Individual subscription | 1 Year 
WE Gold 525 | Shamel Individual subscription | 1 Year 
WE Gold 775 | Shamel Family subscription | 1 Year 
WE Gold 1050 | Shamel Family subscription | 1 Year 
WE Gold 1300 | Shamel Family subscription | 1 Year 
WE Gold 2000 | Shamel Family subscription | 1 Year 
 
**Terms and Conditions:**

 * All WE Gold customer can subscribe by sending “1” in a SMS to short number 111
 * Customer has to download Vezeeta application to register his account on Shamel.
 * Customer has to use his WE Gold mobile number to register on Vezeeta application to get the offer.
 * Customer subscription will be valid for one year starting from subscription date
 * For more information about Shamel or technical support you can call 16676

Travel Experience

## Unique Travel Experience With WE Gold:

Enjoy traveling abroad with WE Gold and get international minutes and data roaming all year round

## 1\. International Minutes Bundle:

 * Starting WE Gold 525, you will be granted monthly international minutes.
 * International minutes are not carried over to the next month.
 * Upon consuming your granted minutes, you will be charged with current international minute rates.
 * International minutes are available exclusively to WE Gold customers.
 * Current roaming receiving minutes rates will apply.
 * The minutes are not eligible for usage in the "hard to reach" countries. For more details visit <https://te.eg/sl/InterRoaming>

## 2\. Data Roaming Bundle:

 * WE Gold customers are eligible for two data roaming bundles twice a year, and every bundle is valid for one week from the time of activating the bundle.
 * The data roaming quota differs according to each price point.
 * The maximum data roaming bundles are 2 bundles per year.
 * You can add extra data roaming bundles with extra fees that will be added to your monthly bill.
 * You can activate the data roaming bundle through My WE app, *800# or by calling 500.
 * The MBs are not eligible for usage in the "hard to reach" countries. For more details visit <https://te.eg/sl/InterRoaming>

## 3\. WE Flight:

 * Starting WE Gold 1300, enjoy outgoing calls to Egypt and the rest of the world by dialing *800*11# during your flight as per the below table:

WE Gold | Number of outgoing minutes per year 
---|--- 
WE Gold 1300 | 4 Minutes / twice a year 
WE Gold 2000 | 6 Minutes / 3 times a year 
 
 * To know more about WE Flight service eligible airlines, please visit <https://te.eg/sl/WEFlight>.
 * You should activate the WE Flight add-on through My WE app or by dialing *800#.
 * After consuming the minutes, you will be charged with the out-of-bundle WE Flight minute rate. Please visit <https://te.eg/sl/WEFlight> for more details.

### Follow the below steps during the flight:

 1. Switch your phone on, make sure airplane mode is off.
 2. Your phone will automatically connect to the AeroMobile network. The network name may be different according to the mobile.
 3. If your phone does not connect to the AeroMobile network automatically, you will need to go to 'Carrier' in your phone settings and manually select AeroMobile.
 4. Once connected, you'll receive a welcome text from AeroMobile. You'll likely receive a text message from your mobile network operator.
 5. You can now use your WE Flight minutes.

Device Installments

### Device Installments Calculator

Choose Your Device And Calculate Your Installments By Device Price And Down Payment

Calculate Device Installments

With WE Gold, you can install any mobile handset and accessories from WE stores with 0% interest rate.

 * Available down payment percentages are 20% & 50% (calculate your installment through the "Installment Calculator").
 * You can pay for your handset on a one-year installment plan with WE Gold without interest.
 * Each price point will have a specific handset installment limit.
 * To know more details about the available devices, visit <https://te.eg/sl/Devices>.

## 1\. Indigo and Fixed Internet Current Customers:

 * If you were an Indigo customer starting from Indigo 225 for 6 months or more, you can benefit from the handset installment immediately once you migrate to WE Gold.
 * If you were a Fixed Internet customer starting from Super 200 for 12 months or more, you can benefit from the handset installment immediately once you migrate to WE Gold.

## 2\. New WE Gold Customers:

 * Starting WE Gold 260, you can benefit from the handset installment feature after 12 months.
 * Starting WE Gold 775, you can benefit from the handset installment feature after 6 months.
 * You can benefit from the handset installment feature only if there are no due bills.

## 3\. WE Gold iPhone 17 Installments:

 * Minimum Down Payment: Customers must pay 20% of the total device price including VAT upfront.
 * Eligibility: Available exclusively for active WE Gold customers (WE Gold 775, WE Gold 1050, WE Gold 1300, WE Gold 2000).
 * Installment Tenure: The remaining balance will be divided into 12 equal monthly installments.
 * Buy iPhone 17 Now at WE Stores 

Sector | Store Name 
---|--- 
New Cairo | Cairo Festival City Mall

## 4\. WE Gold (WE Air - MiFi) Devices Installments:

 * 0% interest rate from WE Stores upon installments for up to 12 months.
 * WE Air devices installments starts from EGP45.
 * MiFi devices installments starts from EGP 53.
 * To check available devices, [click here](https://te.eg/wps/portal/te/Personal/Devices/4G-Routers).

Good to Know

## How To Join WE Gold

 * Now you can join WE Gold, by visiting the nearest WE store to buy your new line
 * You can migrate to WE Gold from any other WE plan.
 * Choose your preferred number from[ _here_](https://numbers.te.eg)
 * Terms and conditions apply for the current ability to pay documents

## How To Join WE Gold With Your Number

 * To migrate from other networks to WE Gold, you must visit the nearest WE branch and the migration process will be completed within only 24 hours.

## Enjoy Sharing Your Bundle With Your Family

 * You can share your minutes and mobile gigabytes with up to 6 members according to each price point
 * You can add extra members to family group with 10 EGP per member and the fees will to be added to your monthly bill
 * Family members can be subscribers of any of the following plans (12Pts, Kix, Super Kix, New Kix, Kix Plus, Tazbeet, Indigo 5, 45, 105, 225, 375 or 750)
 * You can add family members and share your bundle through My WE app,*800# or call the call center on 500 for more details.
 * Once the member is added to the family group, you should add consumption limit to the minutes and mobile gigabytes.
 * Consumption limits are renewed automatically on monthly basis. In case the family group owner adjusted the limit, the new limit will be renewed automatically.
 * You can also pay the mobile payments of your family members either partially or fully.
 * Family group owner can modify or delete the members. Members also can remove themselves from the group.
 * Family group members can’t either join any other family groups nor he/she could be an owner of a another family group
 * Family group members will be granted 10,000 intra-minutes to make calls between each other and between members and owner only.
 * Family group owner can’t share add-ons with group members as add-ons are consumed by group owner only except when subscribing in Nitro Family add-ons

## WE Bonus Monthly Points

 * You will accumulate monthly points to be redeemable at WE stores and WE Bonus partners network
 * Each WE Gold bundle will be granted monthly bonus points when paying the monthly invoice, excluding taxes and installments.
 * You can redeem every 100 points for 5 EGP at WE store or through WE Bonus partners network
 * Points are not transferred or assigned to any other number. In case the line is deactivated, the use of the monthly points will be stopped.
 * Points are valid for 2 years from the date of receiving them.
 * Know more about WE Bonus partners network and your points expiry date through My WE app.
 * All We Bonus services and application browsing are available only within Egypt.

## Device Annual Voucher

 * Starting WE Gold 525, you will receive an annual device voucher
 * The voucher's validity is just one year
 * The voucher will be redeemed with only on item from the available devices, accessories, and routers available in _**[WE stores](https://te.eg/wps/portal/te/Personal/WE-Bonus#stores)**_
 * The voucher can’t be used to buy a line, pay a bill or renew a bundle
 * In case of bundle upgrading or downgrading during the year you will receive the voucher according to the bundle with the longer period
 * You will be eligible to receive your first device voucher after paying 12 complete bills excluding prorated bills, after 12 months from joining WE Gold with condition that there are no due bills.
 * The voucher can be deducted partially or totally from the device value.
 * You can redeem your annual voucher at all B.Tech branches
 * Terms and conditions apply.

## Landline Subscription

 * With WE Gold, enjoy your all on one bundle through adding your landline
 * Starting WE Gold 260,you can subscribe in WE Ardy current packages (20, 35, 65) with additional monthly fees added to your monthly invoice.
 * Starting WE Gold 1050, get WE Ardy 20. You can also upgrade to WE Ardy 35 and 15 EGP will be added to your monthly fees
 * Terms and conditions apply for landline contract and installation
 * Landline subscription is optional to all WE Gold plans

## General Terms And Conditions

 * All bundles prices are tax exclusive
 * WE Gold line price is 81.23 EGP for all price points
 * The monthly invoice will be issued on either 1st or the 16th of each month according to the customer’s bill cycle
 * Customers are not eligible to downgrade WE Gold bundle before 6 months and up to 12 months in case of receiving special dials and based on the price point
 * WE Gold customer is responsible for paying all contracting fees, change of ownership and service installation fees for Fixed Internet, WE Air and Landline.

#### WE Space

**Do you prefer to have best gaming and streaming experience?**

Get 2x the gigabytes while gaming and streaming, in addition to the basic quota to be used as needed.

Enjoy the fastest internet with the highest upload & lowest lag while gaming and get the maximum speed while playing using any device.

### Choose home zone

[Click Here](https://te.eg/wps/portal/te/Personal/WE-Air-Prepaid/Check-Availability/!ut/p/z1/jY_BCsIwEAW_SPKStqk5VoMhpG2sRWxzkZwkoFVE_H6jCB6K1b0tzLCzxJGOuMHfw8Hfwnnwx7j3ju8zSKbRosS6pGhEWi-syhKolOxegGkko1bBWMEFikpLiE3OMGfE_eNPAE8fX6ZA9N3kCeANfBJNncREIbFccYoqHwHjH35VtP5KLqdth6BnD58NzIk!/dz/d5/L0lHSkovd0RNQUZrQUVnQSEhLzROVkUvZW4!/)

[ Prepaid ](https://te.eg/wps/portal/te/Personal/WE-Air-Prepaid) [ ](https://te.eg/wps/portal/te/Personal/WE-Air-Postpaid) [ Postpaid ](https://te.eg/wps/portal/te/Personal/WE-Air-Postpaid)

### WE Air

Now, you can enjoy WE Air, the 4G or 5G fixed Router is your choice for connectivity with the highest value for bundles in the market. 
WE Air routers available for WE Gold customers with 12-month installments with 0% interest Check WE Gold installment program for details [Click Here](https://te.eg/wps/portal/te/Personal/Mobile/WE-Gold).

#### WE Air 250

#### 40 GB

###### 250 EGP/Month

Add to compare

[know more](?1dmy&urile=wcm%3apath%3a%2Fte%2Fresidential%2Fgis%2Fpackages%2Fpackage1%2Fpackage1)

#### WE Air 400

#### 105 GB

###### 400 EGP/Month

Add to compare

[know more](?1dmy&urile=wcm%3apath%3a%2Fte%2Fresidential%2Fgis%2Fpackages%2Fpackage2%2Fpackage2)

#### WE Air 600

#### 200 GB

###### 600 EGP/Month

Add to compare

[know more](?1dmy&urile=wcm%3apath%3a%2Fte%2Fresidential%2Fgis%2Fpackages%2Fpackage3%2Fpackage3)

#### WE Air 900

###### 900 EGP/Month

Add to compare

[know more](?1dmy&urile=wcm%3apath%3a%2Fte%2Fresidential%2Fgis%2Fpackages%2Fpackage4%2Fpackage4)

#### WE Air 1100

#### 400 GB

###### 1100 EGP/Month

Add to compare

[know more](?1dmy&urile=wcm%3apath%3a%2Fte%2Fresidential%2Fgis%2Fpackages%2Fpackage5%2Fpackage5)

#### WE Air 1400

#### 500 GB

###### 1400 EGP/Month

Add to compare

[know more](?1dmy&urile=wcm%3apath%3a%2Fte%2Fresidential%2Fgis%2Fpackages%2Fpackage6%2Fpackage6)

### Extra Quotas

 * There are 4 on-demand packages to be added when needed.
 * Packages are not automatically renewed. 
 * You can subscribe to any of these packages through [MY WE](http://www.te.eg/app) mobile application.

Package Name | Price | Quota (Gigabytes) 
---|---|--- 
WE Air Add-On 20 | 20 | 3 GB 
WE Air Add-On 60 | 60 | 9.5 GB 
WE Air Add-On 90 | 90 | 12 GB 
WE Air Add-On 130 | 130 | 20 GB 
 
 * Add-on packages are valid for 30 days
 * Prices Excluding Taxes

 * **Discover routers **[Know More](https://te.eg/wps/portal/te/Personal/Devices/4G-Routers)

FAQ's

 1. **What is WE Air service?**

 * WE Air is a 4G or 5G mobile Router available to work anywhere in Egypt. It works with WE Data SIM card instead of fixed line connectivity.
 * WE Air is locked on WE network and data sim only
 * It can be used in 1 place at a time. Changing zone is available through WE Call center. Or you can pay EGP 40 one time to add new home zone.
 

 2. **What are the specifications of the device?**

WE is offering two devices as follows:

 
**LTE CAT4 Router**
 * High Speed Download 
150Mbps/Upload 50Mbps
 * Wi-Fi Bands: 802.11 b/g/n, 2.4GHz 2*2
 * Supports Up to 32 Wi-Fi Devices
**LTE CAT6 Router**
 * High Speed Download 
300Mbps/Upload 50Mbps
 * Wi-Fi Bands:802.11 b/g/n/ac, 2.4GHz 2x2 & 5GHz 2x2 MIMO
 * Supports Up to 64 Wi-Fi Devices
 

 3. **LTE CAT7 Router**
 * •High Speed Download 
300Mbps/Upload 100Mbps
 * Wi-Fi Bands:802.11 b/g/n/ac, 2.4GHz 2x2 & 5GHz 2x2
 * Supports Up to 64 Wi-Fi Devices
 4. **Do the packages renew automatically or on-demand?**

 * Main packages (250, 400, 600, 900, 1100) renew every 30 days automatically if you have sufficient balance
 * You can subscribe to any of the Add-ons when needed (there is no maximum limit to subscribe to add-ons
 

 5. **What are the required documents to purchase the device/data line?**

 * The same documents you need to purchase any device or data line from WE. National ID for Egyptians
 
**How can the location of the service be determined?**

 * Choose the desired location by[Clicking Here](https://te.eg/wps/portal/te/Personal/We-Air-4G/Check-Availability)
 * Visit one of our branches
 * Call 111 for support
 

 6. **Can I install the device in another location than the one I registered with?**

 * No, it has to be used in the locations already registered on the system. In case installed in another location, the service will not be working.
 
**What is the consumption rules?**

 * 1MB for every 1MB you use on all website all the day times.
 
**How to renew the package?**

 * The main package is renewed every month if there is enough balance.
 * You can also renew your package early through MyWe App and remaining megabytes will be carried over.
 
**What happens when the package is fully consumed?**

 * You can choose any of the following through My WE mobile app
 * Early-renew the package
 * Change to another package
 * Subscribe to any add-on
 
**Will the remaining MBs be carried over to the next month?**

 * Carry-over is available for the main packages only upon on-time renewal
 
**What is the validity of the Add-ons?**

 * The add-on is valid for 30 days from the subscription date and it’s not automatically renewable
 
**How can I know all my consumption details?**

 * You can control your package through MY WE app, the router's home page, or by dialing *979 # when using the sim in a mobile device
 * Call 111 from any WE number or 0155 5000111 from any other number.
 
**How can I use MY WE app to manage my package?**

 * Download the My WE mobile app from the app store
 * Register with mobile number of the data sim
 * The activation code can be received on the router's main page or on your mobile device
 * After activation, you can manage your account (charging, renewing packages, add-ons, consumption ... etc.)

[know more](?1dmy&urile=wcm%3apath%3a%2Fte%2Fresidential%2Fwe%2Bair%2Bpackages_postpaid%2Fpackages%2Fpackage6%2Fpackage6)

### Extra Quotas

 * There are 4 on-demand packages to be added when needed.
 * Packages are not automatically renewed. 
 * You can subscribe to any of these packages through [MY WE](http://www.te.eg/app) mobile application.

Package Name | Price | Quota (Gigabytes) 
---|---|--- 
WE Air Add-On 20 | 20 | 3 GB 
WE Air Add-On 60 | 60 | 9.5 GB 
WE Air Add-On 90 | 90 | 12 GB 
WE Air Add-On 130 | 130 | 20 GB 
 
 * Add-on packages are valid for 30 days
 * Prices Excluding Taxes

 * **Discover routers **[Know More](https://te.eg/wps/portal/te/Personal/Devices/4G-Routers)

FAQ's

 1. **What is WE Air Postpaid service?**

 * It’s the same WE Air packages currently available but with a different payment method, postpaid billing instead of prepaid. With this Plan, you enjoy uninterrupted internet service without the need for recharging.
 * A monthly bill is issued on a fixed date, and you can pay it through any WE store or via the My WE App. This ensures greater service continuity without interruptions.
 * You can also subscribe to additional add-on bundles if you consume your main package during the month. The add-on charges will simply be added to your next bill.
 * Add-ons are valid for a one-time use and do not auto-renew.
 * Any remaining megabytes from your main package will roll over to the next month and will be consumed after the new package is used.
 

 2. **What devices are available with WE Air Postpaid?**

WE Air Postpaid provides high-performance router options either 4G or 5G:

 
**Huawei CAT4 Router**
 3. * High Speed Download 
195 Mbps/Upload 103Mbps
 * Wi-Fi Bands: 802.11 b/g/n, (2.4GHz)
 * Supports Up to 32 Wi-Fi Devices
**Huawei CAT7 Router**
 4. High Speed Download 
300Mbps/Upload 100Mbps
 5. Wi-Fi Bands: 802.11 b/g/n, 2.4GHz 2*2
 6. Supports Up to 64 Wi-Fi Devices
 

 7. **How do WE Air Postpaid packages work?**

 * The main WE Air Postpaid bundles (250, 400, 600, 900, 1100, and 1400) will be renewed by the bill cycle.
 * Add-ons are available anytime when needed, with no limit on how many you can subscribe to.
 

 8. **What documents are needed to subscribe to WE Air Postpaid?**

 * All you need is your National ID (for Egyptians) and ATP (Ability to Pay) or commitment form according to your bundle.
 * The same conditions as purchasing a regular WE postpaid line apply.
 
**How is the service location determined?**

You can set your registered location through:

 * [Click Here](https://te.eg/wps/portal/te/Personal/We-Air-4G/Check-Availability)
 * Visiting any WE store
 * Call 111 for assistance
 

 9. **Can I use my WE Air router in a different location?**

 * Yes, For We Air higher bundles starting from We Air 600 till We Air 1400, can use the router in the two registered location. But We Air 250 and We Air 400 can only use the router in one location and if you want to add additional concurrent home zone, you will pay 40EGP as an annual fee.
 
**How do I renew my package?**

 * Your main package renews automatically every month if your postpaid bill is settled and there is no early renew as according to your bill cycle.
 
**What happens if I consume all my MBs?**

 * You have flexible options via the My WE app like switching to a different package or subscribing to any available add-on
 
**What is the validity of add-ons?**

 * Each add-on is valid for 30 days from the subscription date and does not renew automatically.
 
**How can I track my consumption?**

 * You can easily monitor your usage through:
 * The My WE mobile app
 * Calling 111 from any WE line or 0155 5000111 from any other network
 
**How do I manage my WE Air Postpaid account through the My WE app?**

 * Download the My WE app from your app store
 * Register using your data SIM mobile number
 * Retrieve the activation code from the router homepage or via SMS if the SIM is used in a phone
 * After activation, you can control your package through MY WE app, the router's home page, or by dialing *979 # when using the sim in a mobile device.
 
**What happens if I leave a 5G coverage area?**

 * Your device will automatically switch to the best available network, such as 4G or 3G, to keep you connected without interruption.

#### Enterprise Prepaid Tariffs

We provide prepaid tariffs for corporate Mobile customer including voice and mobile internet to cover your needs.

WE Business | 25 | 40 | 65 | 90 
---|---|---|---|--- 
Mobile internet MBs | 500 | 1,000 | 2,500 | 4,000 
Units | 300 | 800 | 1,500 | 2,500 
Intra-Company Minutes | 250 | 400 | 700 | 800 
 
#### Terms & Conditions

 * 1 Minute to We Mobile or land line customers = 1 unit.
 * 1 Minute to Other Operators = 5 units.
 * Prices are subjectable to normal taxation.
 * Resources will be carried over for one month only when the customer renew the bundle before or on the renewal date and consumption will be for the old resources first.
 * Resources will be lost if customer renewed the bundle after due date
 * Bundle validity = 30 days.
 * Customer will be charged with a flat rate of 12 pt. for every minute or megabyte consumed after consuming the main bundle.

Z7_50D2I0S0L0NE8060LLTG9E10Q2

#### WE Business Shared Data

Empower your business with seamless, cost-efficient connectivity. **WE Business Shared Data Bundle** is a powerful M2M solution that pools megabytes (MBs) across multiple SIMs, allowing your devices to share data from a single, centralized pool. This gives your machines the freedom to communicate, exchange information, and operate reliably—without the need for human intervention.

Machine-to-Machine (M2M) communication is exactly what it sounds like: devices talking to each other automatically, sharing data and performing tasks in real time. With WE’s M2M solution, your devices don’t just connect—they collaborate, helping your business run smarter, faster, and more efficiently.

### Why choose WE Business Shared Data Bundle?

 * **Cost Savings:** Pay for a single data pool instead of individual SIM plans.
 * **Scalable Connectivity:** Easily add more devices without worrying about separate data plans.
 * **Reliable M2M Communication:** Ideal for IoT, smart meters, POS devices, and other connected machines.
 * **Simplified Management:** Monitor usage across all devices from a single dashboard.

**Turn your connected devices into business enablers – reduce downtime, improve efficiency, and stay connected wherever your operations take you.**

[Register](https://te.eg/customer/en/business/1)

{}

Z7_50D2I0S0L0NE8060LLTG9E10Q1

#### Smart Meters

Smart meters is an electronic device gives both you and your energy provider accurate and regular updates on how much electricity or gas you use.

Smart meters go the extra step in helping you keep track of how much utilities your household is actually using.

Unlike an analogue meter, a smart meter records your usage of utilities at half-hourly intervals, and sends the data daily to your retailer using 4G technology.

#### Why should you get a smart meter?

###### Automatic Readings: No Requirement to Submit Readings Minimizing Site Visit

###### Accurate invoices: no more estimated bills

###### Enables you to accurately track energy consumptions using regular actual reads

###### Great control over energy consumption

###### Protect the environment by reducing Co2 emissions.

[Register](https://te.eg/customer/en/business/1)

#### WE Air Business

### Connect your business with highest speed

Bundle | WE Business Air 4G 250 | WE Business Air 4G 400 | WE Business Air 4G 600 | WE Business Air 4G 900 | WE Business Air 4G 1100 
---|---|---|---|---|--- 
Quota | 40,000 MBs | 105,000 MBs | 200,000 MBs | 325,000 MBs | 400,000 MBs 
Price / month | 250 | 400 | 600 | 900 | 1100 
 
#### Business Air Terms & Conditions:

 1. WE Business Air Router works on WE Network coverage and is locked on the WE data SIM. 
 2. To subscribe contact your account manager or call 522 for more details
 3. Available routers are (LTE CAT4 router EGP1700 or LTE CAT7 router EGP 2500)
 4. WE Business Air 250 and 400 bundles are used in one location
 5. WE Business Air 600 , 900 & 1100 bundles can be used in two locations
 6. You can add extra location with 40 EGP paid once life time
 7. Bundle automatically renews every 30 days.
 8. Add-on packages are available on-demand and not automatically renewed.

Addon Bundles | Price/EGP | Quota 
---|---|--- 
WE Business AIR 4G ADD-ON 15 | 15 | 3000 MBS 
WE Business AIR 4G ADD-ON 45 | 45 | 9,500 MBS 
WE Business AIR 4G ADD-ON 70 | 70 | 12,000 MBS 
WE Business AIR 4G ADD-ON 100 | 100 | 20,000 MBS 
 
 * Add-on packages are valid for 30 days
 * Prices Excluding Taxes
 * Change of location requests should be done through customer care 522
 * You can access the router’s dashboard through [My WE App](http://www.te.eg/app) or by accessing the router’s main page using the following steps: 
 * Connect your mobile or computer to the router’s Wi-Fi network, Please refer to the label on the bottom of the router for the default SSID (network name) and Wi-Fi Key (password) . (SSID & Wi-Fi Key is unique for each device).
 * Open your browser and write down on address bar router default IP address: 192.168.8.1 (Default IP wrote on the label on the bottom of the router).
 * Enter default username: admin and default password: admin of Router login page (Default username and password wrote on the label on the bottom of the router)
